'''''Episode I Adventures 14: Podrace to Freedom''''' was the fourteenth installment of ''[[Star Wars]] [[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures|Episode I Adventures]]''.

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''Anakin Skywalker is a slave on the planet Tatooine. When a band of visitors needs a way to leave Tatooine, he offers to help.''

''His only hope is to win the most dangerous Podrace of his life.''

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|adaptation}}
